subject: docs(todo): reorganize TODO by impact, move pinch-to-zoom to declined
body:
Reranked all TODO items by user impact instead of effort:
- Moved "Unassigned image feedback" and "Accessibility pass" to High
  Priority (both violate UX Non-Negotiables in CLAUDE.md)
- Moved "Pinch-to-zoom" to Considered & Declined — canvas already fits
  viewport, gesture conflicts with page swipe, high complexity / low ROI
- Fixed stale "Calculate imageAspectRatio" description — referenced
  App.jsx:94 useState(null) which no longer exists, now points to
  TemplatesTab.jsx:171 where getSuggestedLayouts(null) is hardcoded
- Updated file line counts to current actuals
- Reordered within sections by impact

Tags: docs, todo, prioritization
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
